Miyapur is in North Hyderabad, Telangana. The region is known for its affordability of homes. The region is very much connected to the rest of the city via several modes of transport. There are a few malls residing within a close radius of the Miyapur region. The locality has only grown in terms of price rates over the years. There still are a few budget housing solutions available here. There are numerous plans on the works to be implemented, in terms of laying link roads and setting up new IT parks. Miyapur NeighbourhoodMiyapur is known for its commercial complexes that house some of the biggest names in retail and entertainment, such as Inorbit Mall, City Centre Mall, and D-Mart. Apart from that, Miyapur is also home to restaurants, bars, and clubs, making it a hub for entertainment, shopping, and dining in Hyderabad.

Yapral is a neighbourhood of Secunderabad, Telangana, India's north-eastern suburbs. It was a village Panchayat until the mid-1980s, when it was absorbed into the Alwal Municipal Corporation (MCA). The Greater Hyderabad Municipal Corporation was formed in 2007 when 12 municipalities, including Alwal, and eight village Panchayats in and around Hyderabad united to form the Greater Hyderabad Municipal Corporation (GHMC). Yapral has been a member of GHMC since then (Neredmet Division, Malkajgiri Circle). Infrastructure and Details Yapral is one of Hyderabad's emerging areas, located in the north-eastern section of the city. Sainikpuri, Kapra, Alwal, Bolarum, and Kowkur are all located near Yapral. The horizontal residential development is the most significant aspect of Yapral. Yapral is 11 kilometres from Secunderabad Junction, which may be reached by the Hyderabad-Mancherial Highway. Mettuguda Metro Station on the Blue Line is 12 kilometres from Yapral and is accessible through Gough Road. The Rajiv Gandhi International Airport is 43 kilometres away and may be reached through the PV Narasimha Rao Expressway. Yapral's major bus terminal is also only 1 km away through Yapral Main Road. Madhapur is 24 kilometres distant, and Manikonda is 27 kilometres away, both of which are easily accessible from Yapral along the Hyderabad-Mancherial Highway. Property in Yapral Yapral has a number of luxurious enclaves, such as Bhanu Enclave, Manii Enclave, Employees Colony, and high-rise residences, which attracts more house buyers. Some projects located here include: Sabari Nivas GK Pride Devi Kalyan Towers Om Sree Patels Green Front LG Veda Heights

Medchal-Malkajgiri district is a district in the Indian state of Telangana, Hyderabad. Shamirpet is the district headquarters. It is the second most populous district with a population of 25 lakh and also a 91.40% urbanized district in the state of Telangana, standing next to Hyderabad district, which has a population of 40 lakh. The district shares boundaries with Hyderabad, Medak, Sangareddy, Y. Bhuvanagiri, Siddipet, and Rangareddy districts. The majority of the district consists of Hyderabad City (GHMC). The district covers an area of ​​1,084 square kilometers (419 sq mi). It is located 505 meters above sea level. The dominant feature is the rocky terrain and monolithic rocks on the outskirts of the city. According to the 2011 Indian census, the district is the second most populous district in the state, with a population of 2,440,073. The district will have two revenue divisions of Keesara and Malkajgiri. They are divided into 15 mandalas. Sri V. Venkateswarlu, IAS, is the new District Collector. All basic amenities like hospitals, schools, colleges, and markets are available nearby. It is an HMDA-approved gated community enterprise near Dhundigal, very near to ORR, ready to build 100 plus ACERS gated community enterprise with a world-class pool clubhouse with amenities and more.

Himayatnagar is a locality in Hyderabad, Telangana, India. It is a mandal in Hyderabad District. This area is named after the 1st son of the last Nizam of Hyderabad - "Mir Himayat Ali Khan (Azam Jah)." The locale is positioned at the South Eastern region of Hussain Sagar. It is neighbor to Narayanguda, Basheerbagh and Hyderguda. In the mid-1960s, Himayatnagar developed into the residential and commercial frontier of Hyderabad city. Now, it ranks #67 in top 70 in Secunderabad acquiring premium locality. Telugu is the local language here. This is the preferred area for business class, bureaucrats, educated people.
Read More
Telangana State Road Transport Corporation (TSRTC) buses gives feasible connectivity for Himayatnagar to all parts of the city
more
Commercial complexes like supermarkets, schools, banks, commercial offices, stadium, railways, buses, restaurants, fitness centers, are abundant within the area
more
Himayatnagar is developed with the Telangana State Tourism Development Corporation along with the Telugu Academy offices
more
Tirumala Tirupati Devasthanam is also situated at Himayatnagar
What is good here
Hyderabad Railway Station is only 4 km from the locale through NH-44
As the locality is well-observed by police staff patrolling, the area is relatively safe at nightread more
Sufficient metro parks
What can be better
The maintenance of parks are not well
Large number of bats are seen in the locale that irks residents
Due to large number of vehicles passing, the environment is usually polluted

Puppalaguda is a residential area located in the western zone of Hyderabad in Telangana. It is a village in Ranga Reddy district that covers 17 square km. The climate of this area is hot and humid. This village’s overall population is 28294. The male and female populations are 1442 and 13867 respectively. This area is coordinated with 17.3982º N, 78.3749º E. Here, Telugu and Urdu are official languages, but most people choose Telugu to communicate. Infrastructure and Details Manikonda Municipality maintains Puppalaguda. Famous places for tourist visits are Mrugavani National Park (18 km), Chilkur Balaji Temple (17.5 km), Osman Sagar (7.8 km) and many more. Prominent localities around this area are Manikonda (1.1 km), Banjara Hills (9.7 km), Neknampur (1.8 km) etc. Eminent roads of Puppalaguda include the Shankarpalli-Hyderabad Road and the Nehru Outer Ring Road, which connect to the prime parts of the city. Furthermore, at Raidurg Metro Station, the line goes under Khajaguda - Nanakramguda Road. Railway stations like Borabanda Railway (14 km) can be reached by Hitech City Main Road (8.9 km). The Airport is also near the village, almost 31 km, known as Rajiv Gandhi International Airport. Reputed educational institutes like Pavitra International School (750 metres), Hyderabad presidency college (2.4 km), Sri Chaitanya Junior College etc., are located in this area. Hospitals in Puppalaguda are like home to their patients, for instance, Hayath Hospital (6.1 km), Apple Multi Speciality Hospital (6.1 km) and many more. Some prominent shopping centres around this village are Inorbit Mall Cyberabad (8.6 km) and Ramireddy Mall (1.2 km). Leading companies, workspace, and government offices are also here for employment, such as International Tech Park (8 km), Mindspace Madhapur IT Park (8 km), Manikonda Municipal Office (550 metres), and RCO Office is some government offices here. Property in Puppalaguda This area offers independent houses, villas, penthouses and alike. You can get up to a 5BHK flat easily. The minimum size of a plot here is 1300 square feet. Residential builders like Hallmark Builders, Navanaami projects Pvt Ltd mainly undertakes all the housing schemes in this area.

Bandlaguda is a residential area in Hyderabad that is being developed into a satellite town with its own infrastructure. The area lies between the Nehru outer ring road and the PV Narasimha Rao Expressway. The localities around Bandlaguda are good residential areas and they include Kismatpur, Gandhamguda, Hydershakote, Bhagavad Guda, and Peerancheruvu. There are 7 to 8 major IT and tech parks within a radius of 18 km. This factor along with the healthy liveability of Bandlaguda has steadily been increasing the demand for housing in the locality. Real estate in BandlagudaThere are several types of property available in Bandlaguda and they include apartments, villas, and residential plots. 66% of all the property includes apartments and they mostly comprise 2, 3, and 4-bedroom apartments. There are 8 new residential projects underway in Bandlaguda and 7 of them are still under construction. The airport, nearest metro, and railway stations are all 10 to 25 km away but easily accessible by road. The area has good infrastructure and there are several parks, schools, hospitals, and markets in the locality. The only problems are heavy traffic and road conditions.

Begumpet is a developing locality situated in Secunderabad, Hyderabad, Telangana. The pin code for Begumpet is 500016 and postal head office is Prakashamnagar. Old Patigadda, Gagan Vihar Colony, Rr Gopal Compound, Prakash Nagar are the nearby localities to Begumpet. Begumpet has good connectivity to all major localities through roadways and by metro service. Telugu is the local language in this region. 2 BHK and 3 BHK are the most common room design in Begumpet. Jalavihar water park is a famous tourist attraction at this region. Hussain Sagar Pond Center is adjacent to Begumpet. The Hussain Sagar railway junction is nearby to this locality and all the long distance trains halt at this area. There are good employment options here as many of the industries have expanded their operations into this region due to good connectivity. Schools and Colleges are at a walking distance making it easy for the kids. There are no load sheading issues in Begumpet and if there is some maintenance work prior notice is given to the residents. Begumpet doesn’t face water scarcity or water logging issues.

Patancheru is a rapidly developing industrial and residential area located in the suburbs of Hyderabad, India. It is situated along the National Highway 65 and is well-connected to other parts of Hyderabad through various modes of transport, including buses and taxis. Patancheru is known for its vast industrial estate and is home to several large companies in the pharmaceutical, chemical, and engineering sectors. Nearby localities to Patancheru are Miyapur, Bachupally, Nizampet, Kukatpally, and Chandanagar, among others.Apart from being an industrial hub, Patancheru also offers a good standard of living with a range of residential options including apartments, villas, and independent houses. The area has several schools, hospitals, and shopping centers, making it a popular choice for families. Patancheru is surrounded by several natural attractions, including the Manjeera Wildlife Sanctuary and the Singur Dam, which is a popular spot for nature lovers and picnickers. In addition, the area has several temples and religious landmarks, including the famous Sri Sita Rama Swamy Temple, which is one of the oldest temples in the region. Overall, Patancheru is a thriving and rapidly growing part of Hyderabad, offering a unique blend of industry, nature, and culture.

Gurram Guda Gurram Guda is one of the fastest-growing localities in Hyderabad, Telangana. It is situated within the Ranga Reddy District. Gurram Guda is under the governance of the Badangpet Municipal Corporation. The coordinates are the following- Latitude: 17.2942194215. Longitude: 78.5658173526. Gurram Guda has people speaking in both English and Telugu. Some landmarks in the locality include the GGR Tennis Academy, the Stop and Play game zone, GNR Cricket Ground, BJ & Sons Indoor Swimming Pool, and Hasten Go-Karting. Other landmarks include the Hanuman Temple and many other temples along with the lush green Sanjeevani Vanam. Infrastructure and Details Gurram Guda is 12 km away from Hyderabad City. LB Nagar and Vanastalipuram are 6 km and 3 km away respectively. The Nagarjuna Sagar Highway is only 1 km away from Gurram Guda. The main thoroughfare in the locality is the Gurram Guda X Road, while the Huppuguda Railway Station lies 14.8 km away from it. The Rajiv Gandhi International Airport is 15.7 km away from this neighborhood. There are many schools near Gurram Guda, including the Leading Heights Digi School, which is only 400 metres away and the Lords High School, which is 7.3 km away from the locality. The IC Health Centre is only 170 metres away from the area as well. There are many other shopping centres and other basic essentials nearby. Property in Gurram Guda You can find 2 and 4 BHK independent homes in Gurram Guda. There are several reasonably priced options available for buyers here. The home sizes usually range between 1,200 and 4,000 sq ft on average. You can also find some 1 RK housing units here. With the locality being a fast-developing area, independent homes are more in demand here. There are several options available for those looking for plots and land parcels as well.

Locality Overview Video
Shadnagar is a town in Southern Hyderabad, located at a distance of approximately 50Km from Hyderabad city. Chatanpally, Farooknagar, Solipur, Kishannagar, Elikatta, and Hajipally are the nearby localities to Shadnagar. Active developers of Shadnagar are Glentree Homes, Virtusa Lifespaces, Space Vision Groupe, Vishwak Projects Pvt Ltd, and Building Blocks Group. The real estate market is witnessing significant growth due to the availability of several types of properties as houses, flats, villas, industrial units, and agricultural land. Nearby Schools to Shadnagar are Medha International School, The Aga Khan Academy, Challenger International School, The Leader International School, and Sreenidhi International School. Hospitals that lie close to Shadnagar are Aditya Balaji Children Hospital, Sri Sai Eye Hospital, Vijaya Hospital, Krithika Hospital, and Chandana Children Hospital. Sadhnagar is also strategically located in the vicinity of IT hubs and offices, making it convenient for the residents to access major facilities. Many locations for entertainment, such as shopping malls, parks, and restaurants, are well connected to this locality through bus networks, trains, airs, and other main modes of public transport. The accessibility of key points around Sadhnagar and the quality of living within Sadhnagar makes it one of the most sought-after residential areas.

BN Reddy Nagar has coordinates of 17.3141° N, 78.5613° E. It is a rapidly growing residential zone in northeastern Hyderabad near Badangpet, Almasguda and Gurram Guda among other localities. It is present in the South Hyderabad zone of the Ranga Reddy District in the Indian State of Telangana. Infrastructure and Details The SH-19 is the major connectivity lifeline here along with the Tirumala Nagar Road and Inner Ring Road. The LB Nagar Metro Station is also accessible. The Huppuguda and Yakutpura railway stations lie within a 12 km radius from the area while the Hyderabad International Airport is located 23 km away from it. There are several shopping malls like Mega Shopping Mall (9 km) and South India Shopping Mall (7 km) nearby along with supermarkets such as More (1 km). You will find numerous hospitals like Global Hospital and Kamineni Hospital nearby along with educational institutions such as the Johnson Grammar School. The IDA is 12 km away while Nacharam is 17 km away and these are major industrial hubs. The NSL Arena IT Park is 12 km away from the area. Property in BN Reddy Nagar BN Reddy Nagar offers several residential plots of varying sizes and configurations. There are several options available here for buyers.

When reviewing a rental house, focus on key aspects. Start with the location, noting proximity to schools, work, and amenities. Describe the condition of the property, including cleanliness and maintenance issues. Highlight any amenities such as parking, laundry, or outdoor space. Assess the neighborhood, considering safety, community atmosphere, and noise levels. Comment on the landlord or management regarding their responsiveness and professionalism. Finally, evaluate the value for money in relation to similar properties. Personal experiences, both positive and negative, can provide valuable insights for potential renters and help them make informed decisions.

Common dislikes about a rental house often include poor maintenance, such as leaking faucets or malfunctioning appliances. An inconvenient location far from public transport, shops, or schools can hinder daily life. Limited amenities, such as a lack of laundry facilities or parking, can be frustrating. The demand for this place has increased in the last few years due to its proximity to educational and employment hubs. Real estate in KukatpallyKukatpally has many premium apartments that are ready to move and under construction. There are approximately three metro stations around this locality that makes traveling easy for residents. Moreover, it is situated close to many markets and malls. There are also several tourist sites for residents to spend leisure time with family.

Gajularamaram is situated in Hyderabad’s north zone and is one of the fastest-growing residential areas. The locality is in Quthbullapur city in the state of Telangana, India. It is close to some of the major areas. The infrastructure development of the locality has created a boom in its Real Estate. It offers a natural breathing space away from the polluted air and noisy city. It covers 8.35 square kilometres with a tropical wet and dry climate. Gajularamaram has an estimated population of 15032 with coordinates of 17°31'27"N 78°25'29"E. Telugu is widely spoken. Infrastructure and Details Gajularamaram is served by the Greater Hyderabad Municipal Corporation the GHMC and the Hyderabad Metropolitan Development Authority or the HMDA. Popular places include the Aadhya Children Play Area & Day Care Center, Church Of Christ Vasanth Nagar Colony etc. Bachupally (3.67 km), Mahadevpur Colony (4.58 km) lies near Gajularamaram. Major roads include the Nehru Outer Ring Road, Bachupally Road, NH-65 and Pragathi Nagar Road, among others. The Rajiv Gandhi International Airport is the nearest to Gajularamaram which caters to residents. The Gajularamaram locality can access the Red Line KPHB Colony metro station. Reputed educational institutions include the Tatva Global School, Geetanjali Concept School, Montridge School etc. Leading malls like M&S Shopping Mall (6 km), South India Shopping Mall Kukatapally and Manjeera Mall (8 km) are accompanied by reputed hospitals like Usha Mullapudi Cardiac Center, Sri Swastik Hospital and Malla Reddy Narayana Multispeciality Hospital. Major employment hubs include the Hitec City, Financial District, Gachibowli and numerous business parks. Companies like Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, Microsoft India, Accenture Cognizant Technology, HCL Technologies, Genpact, Amazon and others have a presence here. Property in Gajularamaram Gajularamaram offers a wide variety of houses of different sizes. The apartments available vary from 1 BHK to 10 BHK. You can also choose larger apartments, villas, penthouses, independent houses, studio apartments, duplexes, and more as per your budget. Apartments here start from 200 sq ft onwards while going up to 4000 sq ft as well. Then there are bungalows, villas and independent homes with sizes up to 8000 sq ft. There are numerous PMAY and HMDA housing schemes too.

Informally called Neredu Mettu, Neredmet is a residential area in Hyderabad, Telangana, India. It is part of the Medchal-Malkajgiri district's Malkajgiri Mandal and circle. Rachakonda Police Commissionerate, one of the three police commissioners in Hyderabad City, is currently headquartered in Neredmet. Prior to being managed by Malkajgiri Municipality, it was a part of the GHMC-Secunderabad Zone's Malkajgiri Circle. It divides the Greater Hyderabad Municipal Corporation's Ward No. 136, Neredmet (Fully), Ward No. 137, Vinayak Nagar (Fully), Ward No. 138, Moula-Ali (Half), Ward No. 139, East Anandbagh (Partially), and Ward No. 140, Malkajgiri (Half). t was established in 1578 AD, but population growth was fueled by the construction of RK Puram Lake, now known as (Munkidigan Cheruvu). By the early 1800s, Trimulgherry had been home to the Electronics and Mechanical Engineering (EME), which is now known as the Military College of Electronics and Mechanical Engineering (MCEME). The Nizam ordered the construction of RK Puram Lake, a 100-acre body of water, in the middle of the 1800s because the engineers and electricians who worked there need access to water.

Himayatnagar is a locality in Hyderabad, Telangana, India. It is a mandal in Hyderabad District. This area is named after the 1st son of the last Nizam of Hyderabad - "Mir Himayat Ali Khan (Azam Jah)." The locale is positioned at the South Eastern region of Hussain Sagar. It is neighbor to Narayanguda, Basheerbagh and Hyderguda. In the mid-1960s, Himayatnagar developed into the residential and commercial frontier of Hyderabad city. Now, it ranks #67 in top 70 in Secunderabad acquiring premium locality. Telugu is the local language here. This is the preferred area for business class, bureaucrats, educated people.

Sanath Nagar is a major residential and industrial zone in the city of Hyderabad in the State of Telangana and it was earlier a residential zone for several industry workers and officers. The area is also known as the SRT (Single Room Tenements) and has expanded to encompass several localities nearby including the ESI Area, BK Guda and Czech Colony. There are many industrial entities in the locality including Gland Pharma, Bright Star Rubber, GM Motors, Chevrolet, Toyota and Mercedes-Benz among others. Several residential projects are coming up in the area and the Sunday Market has also come up here. Infrastructure and Details The educational institutions in the area include the Covells High School, St Theresa’s Girls High School and the Neena High School. The St. Theresa’s Hospital is a major landmark in the locality. There is also the TSRTC bus terminal in the area along with the nearby MMTS Station that offers local railway connectivity to several areas in the city. Locality Guide
for Muthangi, Hyderabad
Share
Muthangi, which is a promisingly developing area located in the outskirts of Hyderabad, Telangana is also one of the locations predominated by numerous residential plots. Located precisely at the intersection of NH 65 and Nehru Outer Ring Road (ORR), Muthangi is at a distance of 48 km from the centre of Hyderabad. Muthangi is well surrounded by popular areas like Panchateru, Pocharam, Rudraram, Bhanur etc. SLV Comfort, Suchirindia Silver Sands, Subhagruha Sukrithi Aria are some ofthe residential projects being develop in the locality of Muthangi. ORR and NH 65 efficiently connect all the areas of Muthangi to the rest of Hyderabad city. Patancheru railway station is situated at a distance of 5 km from Muthangi and has great train frequency. Orchids The International School, Candiidus International School, Manjeera Residential High School, RRS College of Engineering and Technology, Vishwa Bharati College of Law are some of the top educational institutions of the locality. Muthangi is just 8 km away from Patancheru Industrial Estate which contains some of the popular large scale industries like Asian Paints, Paragon Polymer Production etc. Cognizant, Infosys, TCS, Tech Mahindra are some of the IT Offices proximal to the locality.

Suchitra is said to be the suburbs of Hyderabad in the state of Telangana. It is known as Suchitra Junction or even Suchitra Center or Suchitra Crossroads. The place is quite well known because there was an electronic component unit by the name of Suchitra Junction. The total population of Suchitra is 9025 with coordinates of 17.5084°N and 78.4743°E. Suchitra Junction may not be a big place (1.01 km2) but it is of moderate size. On normal days there is a low risk of rain here and summers are hot here. Telegu is the official language spoken here. Infrastructure and Details Suchitra Junction is served by GHMC. The well-known places here in Suchitra Junction are Charminar, Golconda Fort, Chowmahalla Palace, Salar Jung Museum, Ramoji Film City, Nehru Zoological Park, etc. There are some well-known malls here as well such as KLM shopping mall, RS Brothers, Max, Yesmart, Samsung, Metro Supermarket, Chennai shopping mall, etc. The fastest way to reach Suchitra Junction from Hyderabad is to take a bus from Medchal Or Afzalgunj Bus stop. You can even take the metro to Moosapet Metro station which is 4km away from Suchitra Junction. There are some well-reputed hospitals here like Safe Super Speciality Hospital, Srujana Hospitals, Bhaskara Hospital, RK Children's Clinic, VR Multispeciality Hospitals, etc. Some well-reputed educational institutions are P. Ayati Junior College, Kites Junior College, V. Royal Junior College, F. Sri Chaitanya Junior College, etc. There are even some employment agencies like Anusha Manpower Services, WellMax Group, Info Source Corpe, CIEL HR Services, A and J Global Solutions Private Limited, etc. Property in Suchitra Junction The properties available here are in the following configuration 1BHK, 2BHK, 3BHK & 4BHK independent houses. The size ranges from 540 sq. ft. to 1800 sq. ft. Housing schemes such as PMAY are available.

Begumpet is a developing locality situated in Secunderabad, Hyderabad, Telangana. The pin code for Begumpet is 500016 and postal head office is Prakashamnagar. Old Patigadda, Gagan Vihar Colony, Rr Gopal Compound, Prakash Nagar are the nearby localities to Begumpet. Begumpet has good connectivity to all major localities through roadways and by metro service. Telugu is the local language in this region. 2 BHK and 3 BHK are the most common room design in Begumpet. Jalavihar water park is a famous tourist attraction at this region. Hussain Sagar Pond Center is adjacent to Begumpet. The Hussain Sagar railway junction is nearby to this locality and all the long distance trains halt at this area. There are good employment options here as many of the industries have expanded their operations into this region due to good connectivity. Schools and Colleges are at a walking distance making it easy for the kids. There are no load sheading issues in Begumpet and if there is some maintenance work prior notice is given to the residents. Begumpet doesn’t face water scarcity or water logging issues.

Ameerpet is a prominent commercial and residential neighborhood located in Hyderabad. The area is known for its bustling streets, IT training institutes, and shopping destinations. Here is an overview of Ameerpet, including its history, demographics, and popular landmarks. History Ameerpet is named after Ameer Ali Khan, a former ruler of the princely state of Hyderabad. With the advent of the IT industry in the 1990s, the area became a center for computer training institutes. Demographics Ameerpet is a cosmopolitan neighborhood with a diverse population. The area is home to people from different regions of India, as well as expatriates from other countries. IT Training Institutes Ameerpet is known as the "IT training hub" of Hyderabad, with hundreds of computer training institutes offering courses in programming languages, software testing, data science, and other IT-related fields. Some of the popular institutes in the area include: NIIT Aptech Jetking IIHT HCL Career Development Center Transportation Ameerpet is well-connected to other parts of Hyderabad, with a network of roads, railways, and metro lines. The area has a metro station on the red line of Hyderabad Metro, which connects it to several important destinations in the city. Ameerpet is also a major bus stop, with buses plying to various parts of Hyderabad and other cities in the state. Conclusion Ameerpet is a bustling neighborhood in Hyderabad, known for its commercial activity, IT training institutes, and shopping destinations. With its cosmopolitan population and diverse offerings, Ameerpet is a microcosm of Hyderabad's vibrant culture and economy.

Attapur is a commercial and residential locality in Hyderabad. NPA Shivrampally railway station is situated near the locality. Hospitals and clinics are at a close distance making it easy for patient admission. The roads in Attapur are well-developed and maintained. Attapur doesn’t face any water logging issues as the drainage systems in this locality are well maintained. The locality is served by two major bus routes and also enjoys a close connectivity to the areas like Rajendranagar and Hafeezpet. Real estate in Attapur Attapur has witnessed a huge appreciation in property prices in recent years. There are a number of residential options available in the locality including apartments, villas, plots, and independent houses. The apartments in the locality are available with configurations of 2 and 3 BHK. The properties here offer all basic amenities that provide a comfortable lifestyle to the residents. Some of the top builders of the locality are Shanta Sriram, Aparna Constructions, and Amrutha Builders.

The Hyderabad, India, suburb of Qutbullapur is home to a community called Suraram. The Telangana district of Medchal-Malkajgiri includes this area. It is part of the Greater Hyderabad Municipal Corporation and designated as Ward 129. The Hyderabad area of Suraram is one that is rapidly expanding. Cities like Bachupally, Gajularamaram, and Jeedimetla are not far away. The real estate market in this neighbourhood is booming because of its convenient location near the city's central business district and its abundance of prestigious educational institutions. Apartment communities like Sunyuga Prakruthi and JS Sree Srinivasam may be in the area. Large-scale planned construction has taken place here. Medical care is provided to the community through Health Care Hospitals. A variety of shopping centres, including Manjeera Mall, Forum Sujana Mall, etc., can be found within 14 kilometres of the neighbourhood. The JNTU College metro station and the Srishailam-Hyderabad highway/Nehru Outer Ring Road provide excellent access to the remainder of Hyderabad from Suraram. Suraram is around 8 kilometres from Hyderabad's pharmaceutical centre of Bachupally. Manufacturers of pharmaceuticals, including SMS Pharma, Aurobindo Pharma, Dr Reddy's Lab, etc., are headquartered in Bachupally. A large number of micro, small, and medium-sized enterprises call ALEAP Industrial Estate home. The nearest major airport, Rajiv Gandhi International, is situated 48 kilometres distant from the neighbourhood.

Locality Guide
for Gundlapochampalli, Hyderabad
Share
Strategically located at Medchal Road, Gundlapochampalli is one of the fastest growing areas of Hyderabad. It is well connected to various parts of Secunderabad thus making commuting easy for its residents. The area is also easily accessible through Outer Ring Road (ORR) and is well connected by road and rail networks to the city center and other major hubs of the city. Bolarum is the closest railway station via Kompally Road. The presence of good schools in this locality has attracted many families to settle here. Also, Hi-Tech City is at brief driving distance thus creating various job avenues for working professionals to move here. Several shopping centers meet the needs of the inhabitants living around the area. With well laid social infrastructure such as IT Parks, schools, hospital center and entertainment hubs in the vicinity, Gundlapochampalli has attracted many property buyers to explore the avenues here.

Patancheru is a rapidly developing industrial and residential area located in the suburbs of Hyderabad, India. It is situated along the National Highway 65 and is well-connected to other parts of Hyderabad through various modes of transport, including buses and taxis. Patancheru is known for its vast industrial estate and is home to several large companies in the pharmaceutical, chemical, and engineering sectors. Nearby localities to Patancheru are Miyapur, Bachupally, Nizampet, Kukatpally, and Chandanagar, among others.Apart from being an industrial hub, Patancheru also offers a good standard of living with a range of residential options including apartments, villas, and independent houses. The area has several schools, hospitals, and shopping centers, making it a popular choice for families. Patancheru is surrounded by several natural attractions, including the Manjeera Wildlife Sanctuary and the Singur Dam, which is a popular spot for nature lovers and picnickers. In addition, the area has several temples and religious landmarks, including the famous Sri Sita Rama Swamy Temple, which is one of the oldest temples in the region. Overall, Patancheru is a thriving and rapidly growing part of Hyderabad, offering a unique blend of industry, nature, and culture.

Medchal-Malkajgiri district is a district in the Indian state of Telangana, Hyderabad. Shamirpet is the district headquarters. It is the second most populous district with a population of 25 lakh and also a 91.40% urbanized district in the state of Telangana, standing next to Hyderabad district, which has a population of 40 lakh. The district shares boundaries with Hyderabad, Medak, Sangareddy, Y. Bhuvanagiri, Siddipet, and Rangareddy districts. The majority of the district consists of Hyderabad City (GHMC). The district covers an area of ​​1,084 square kilometers (419 sq mi). It is located 505 meters above sea level. The dominant feature is the rocky terrain and monolithic rocks on the outskirts of the city. According to the 2011 Indian census, the district is the second most populous district in the state, with a population of 2,440,073. The district will have two revenue divisions of Keesara and Malkajgiri. They are divided into 15 mandalas. Sri V. Venkateswarlu, IAS, is the new District Collector. All basic amenities like hospitals, schools, colleges, and markets are available nearby. It is an HMDA-approved gated community enterprise near Dhundigal, very near to ORR, ready to build 100 plus ACERS gated community enterprise with a world-class pool clubhouse with amenities and more.

Himayatnagar is a locality in Hyderabad, Telangana, India. It is a mandal in Hyderabad District. This area is named after the 1st son of the last Nizam of Hyderabad - "Mir Himayat Ali Khan (Azam Jah)." The locale is positioned at the South Eastern region of Hussain Sagar. It is neighbor to Narayanguda, Basheerbagh and Hyderguda. In the mid-1960s, Himayatnagar developed into the residential and commercial frontier of Hyderabad city. Now, it ranks #67 in top 70 in Secunderabad acquiring premium locality. Telugu is the local language here. This is the preferred area for business class, bureaucrats, educated people.

The Hyderabad, India, suburb of Qutbullapur is home to a community called Suraram. The Telangana district of Medchal-Malkajgiri includes this area. It is part of the Greater Hyderabad Municipal Corporation and designated as Ward 129. The Hyderabad area of Suraram is one that is rapidly expanding. Cities like Bachupally, Gajularamaram, and Jeedimetla are not far away. The real estate market in this neighbourhood is booming because of its convenient location near the city's central business district and its abundance of prestigious educational institutions. Apartment communities like Sunyuga Prakruthi and JS Sree Srinivasam may be in the area. Large-scale planned construction has taken place here. Medical care is provided to the community through Health Care Hospitals. A variety of shopping centres, including Manjeera Mall, Forum Sujana Mall, etc., can be found within 14 kilometres of the neighbourhood. The JNTU College metro station and the Srishailam-Hyderabad highway/Nehru Outer Ring Road provide excellent access to the remainder of Hyderabad from Suraram. Suraram is around 8 kilometres from Hyderabad's pharmaceutical centre of Bachupally. Manufacturers of pharmaceuticals, including SMS Pharma, Aurobindo Pharma, Dr Reddy's Lab, etc., are headquartered in Bachupally. A large number of micro, small, and medium-sized enterprises call ALEAP Industrial Estate home. The nearest major airport, Rajiv Gandhi International, is situated 48 kilometres distant from the neighbourhood.

Kundanpally is a locality situated in the city of Hyderabad, India. It is a suburb situated in the North-East of Hyderabad. The area has a population of around 25,000 people living in the many residential complexes and colonies that can be found here. With the development of the Outer Ring Road and the proximity of the IT hub HITEC City, Kundanpally is rapidly developing. It is also home to the prestigious NALSAR University of Law and some of the most renowned schools in Hyderabad. Kundanpally is well-connected by bus and auto services from all parts of Hyderabad. It is surrounded by the natural beauty of the Manjeera River and the Hussainsagar Lake. Many parks, gardens and beautiful landscapes, such as Botanical Gardens, are near the area. Stadiums for sports like cricket, football, basketball, and hockey are also situated in Kundanpally. The locality has many supermarkets, convenience stores, and pharmacies. Shopping malls, multiplexes, and many other stores are within walking distance. Restaurants, cafes, ice cream parlors, and other eateries are quite popular in the locality. Kundanpally is a place that is a blend of modern amenities while still retaining its old-world charm. It is also an ideal place for people who’d like to experience a peaceful and tranquil lifestyle.

Mahendra Hills is a well-known and posh residential locality of Hyderabad or actually Secunderabad. It comes within the governing authority of the SCB or the Secunderabad Cantonment as it is called. It has also raised an appeal towards finally merging with the GHMC (Greater Hyderabad Municipal Corporation). The area is hilly and offers good views. It is a part of Ward VI within the Secunderabad Cantonment and is known as a posh locality here. The views are a key plus point for residents along with the variety of buildings and residential projects. The coordinates are 17.4547° N, 78.5192° E for the locality. Infrastructure and Details The Delhi Public School- Mahendra Hills lies just 1.5 km away from the area while the Narmadha Hospital is situated 1 km away from it. The area is witnessing rapid development of civic and social infrastructure and is one of the most peaceful and tranquil localities to live in Secunderabad. Property in Mahendra Hills You will find several options for Property in Mahendra Hills. There are 2 and 3 BHK independent homes available here along with a variety of residential plots as well. Demand is always high for Property in this reputed locality of Secunderabad.

Locality Guide
for Amberpet, Hyderabad
Share
+
38 More
Amberpet is one of the oldest suburbs and area of Hyderabad. The locality lies adjacent to the world-famous and one of the oldest university in the Indian Sub-continent- Osmania University. This place is also a Mandal in Hyderabad District. It has great infrastructure as the area connects Kachiguda to Ramanthapur in the East, and 6 No. to Malakpet in the South. The word 'Amberpet' refers to "the land of ambergis" meaning sky, hence, the locality also resenbles the highland or land of the skies. The Civil Police Lines Special Armed Reserve (CPL-SAR) belonging to the Andhra Pradesh Police Academy is also positioned adjacent to the Amber Baba Dargah. The locale is rich in its cultural and religious image surrounded by temples like Sri Mahankali Temple, Jai Veer Hanuman Temple, Sri Ram Mandir, and Shivam Temple. Telugu is the local language here. The region is well suited for families with kids because of its proximity to prominent educational institutions. You will find some good schools like Sri Shantiniketan High School, Sri Sathya Sai Vidya Vihar, Divyanjali High School in the vicinity. Tricolour Hospital, Max Care Hospital, Narasimha Hospital, Padmavathi Hospital are few known health centers located within 2km radius. SK Mall and Amberpet Central are shopping malls within 3km in the Amberpet locale
Read More
The Rajiv Gandhi International Airport is located around 25km away accessible via NH 765
There are emerging malls, super markets, and Hi-end businesses lining the main road of Amberpet locality
more
Amberpet and its neighbourhood is a hotspot for upcoming projects with major new industrial estates developing in the area
more
Amberpet is also a home to several tech hubs like Mindspace Pocharam (18km), Infosys SEZ (20km), Hitech City (19km) and Gachibowli (22km) located in the vicinity.
more
What is good here
TSRTC connects buses from several parts of Hyderabad to Amberpet, having the closest MMTS train station located around a km away at Kachiguda or Vidyanagarread more
You will find full security police quarters around some area making it a secure place to go out even at nightread more
Several lush parks are well-maintained and located in and around the locality including Tulasi Nagar Colony Park, Kakatiya Park, etc |read more
What can be better
Though the area is well connected by bus, auto, taxi to all major centers of the city, it lacks in frequency at time intervalsread more
At night, you cannot go out due to safety issues
Due to lack of parking space, people use some of the playground for public parkings
